channel.title: TailorMeSwiftly Blog
channel.description: Career advice, resume tips, interview strategies, and salary negotiation guides from TailorMeSwiftly.

item.title: How to Showcase Soft Skills on Your Resume Without Sounding Generic
item.description: Turn vague soft skills into concrete, measurable achievements.

item.title: Top Skills Employers Want for Tech Roles in 2026
item.description: The most in-demand technical skills for 2026 and how to showcase them on your resume.

item.title: Salary Transparency Laws in 2026: What Job Seekers Need to Know
item.description: New laws are changing how companies share salary data. Use them to your advantage.

item.title: 10 Resume Mistakes That Get You Instantly Rejected
item.description: Recruiters spend 6 seconds on your resume. Discover the 10 most common resume mistakes that get candidates instantly rejected — and how to fix them fast.

item.title: How to Prepare for Any Interview in 30 Minutes
item.description: Walk into any interview feeling confident with this 30-minute prep framework. Cover company research, STAR stories, smart questions, and your elevator pitch before you step through the door.

item.title: Remote Work Resume Tips That Actually Get Callbacks
item.description: Proven strategies to make your remote work experience stand out to hiring managers.

item.title: Healthcare Hiring Trends: What Recruiters Look for in 2026
item.description: Inside the healthcare hiring pipeline and what makes candidates stand out.

item.title: Accessing the Hidden Job Market: A Tactical Playbook
item.description: 80% of jobs are never posted publicly. Learn the referral strategies, cold outreach templates, and networking hacks that unlock the hidden job market.

item.title: The 10 Data Skills in Highest Demand for 2026
item.description: From SQL to dbt to prompt engineering, the data skills hiring managers want right now.

item.title: From Freelance to Full-Time: Translating Contract Work on Your Resume
item.description: How to present freelance and contract experience so employers see stability, not risk.

item.title: Why AI-Tailored Cover Letters Get 3x More Callbacks
Breaking Into Cybersecurity: Skills, Certs, and Resume Strategies
item.description: Everything you need to break into one of the fastest-growing fields.

item.title: How AI Is Changing Resume Screening Forever
item.description: AI-powered ATS systems are getting smarter. Here is how to stay ahead.

item.title: How to Beat ATS Systems in 2026: The Complete Guide
item.description: Learn exactly how Applicant Tracking Systems parse resumes in 2026 and the 7 formatting rules that will get yours past the bots every time.

item.title: Career Change in 2026: The Complete Pivot Playbook
item.description: A step-by-step guide to switching careers, from skill mapping to your first interview.

item.title: The Salary Negotiation Script That Adds $15K to Your Offer
item.description: Most people accept the first offer — and lose $500K over a career. Here's the exact salary negotiation script, timing strategy, and counter-offer phrases that consistently add $15K or more.
